name: Winter Squash and Apple Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Butternut squash - peeled and chopped
2 cups Sweet potato - peeled and chopped
3 medium Apples - peeled, cored and chopped (Spartan, McIntosh or similar cooking apple)
2 cups Water or just enough to cover apples and veggies
1/2 tsp Chinese 5 spice or pumpkin pie spice
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the vegetables, apples, and water to a boil in a saucepan on high heat.
2. Reduce the heat and simmer for 30 minutes, or until all the vegetables are tender.
3. Add the seasonings and use a blender to process the mixture.
4. Heat in the saucepan again on low heat until hot.
5. Keeps 3-5 days refrigerated.
